faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Spuyten Duyvil?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Spuyten Duyvil typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. Smaller apartments may fall on the lower end, while larger multi-bedroom homes or severe infestations requiring multiple treatments will cost more. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Spuyten Duyvil homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and chemical treatment options for Spuyten Duyvil residents. Heat treatment uses specialized equipment to raise room temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs and eggs instantly, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide residual protection. Many clients choose a combination approach for maximum effectiveness, especially in larger homes or multi-unit buildings.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Spuyten Duyvil apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Spuyten Duyvil take 4-8 hours depending on your property size and treatment method. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require you to vacate for 4-6 hours and include a follow-up visit 10-14 days later. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your schedule and provide clear preparation instructions beforehand.

faqs.question: Do you service all of Spuyten Duyvil including buildings near the waterfront?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide bed bug treatment throughout all of Spuyten Duyvil, including waterfront properties near the Hudson River, co-ops along Kappock Street, homes near Henry Hudson Park, and residences throughout the Independence Avenue area.
